question: What is the price of the product offered by ABC Corporation?
answer_paragraph:
Introduction
The purpose of this report is to evaluate the performance of three potential vendors for Smithson Inc.: ABC Corporation, DEF Enterprises, and GHI Industries. The evaluation is based on several key factors, including price, quality, delivery time, and customer service.

Table 1: Vendor Information
| Vendor | Price | Quality | Delivery Time | Customer Service |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ABC Corporation | $100,000 | High | 2 weeks | Excellent |
| DEF Enterprises | $90,000 | Medium | 3 weeks | Good |
| GHI Industries | $110,000 | High | 1 week | Excellent |
